SELECT input_value, to_decades(input_value) AS decade_interval FROM test_decades;
SELECT input_value, to_decades(input_value) AS decade_interval FROM test_decades WHERE input_value > 0;
SELECT input_value, to_decades(input_value) AS decade_interval FROM test_decades WHERE input_value < 0;
SELECT input_value, to_decades(input_value) AS decade_interval FROM test_decades ORDER BY input_value DESC;
SELECT td1.input_value, to_decades(td1.input_value) AS decade_interval, td2.input_value AS second_value FROM test_decades td1 JOIN test_decades td2 ON td1.input_value + td2.input_value = 10;
SELECT td.input_value, to_decades(td.input_value) AS decade_interval FROM (SELECT input_value FROM test_decades WHERE input_value < 10) AS td;
WITH decade_intervals AS (SELECT input_value, to_decades(input_value) AS decade_interval FROM test_decades) SELECT * FROM decade_intervals WHERE decade_interval = 0;
